summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 10 new staff tools features across Founder and Operations portals. Backend: 28/28 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new tabs render correctly with proper RBAC, sidebar collapse works in light/dark mode.

issues: Minor React console warning: 'span cannot be a child of option' - cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/announcements creates announcement (founder only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/announcements lists announcements (staff only)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/announcements/{id} deactivates (founder only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/system-health returns health metrics (founder only)
Backend: POST /api/ops/escalations creates escalation (staff only)
Backend: GET /api/ops/escalations lists escalations
Backend: PUT /api/ops/escalations/{id}/resolve resolves (founder only)
Backend: POST /api/ops/shift-notes creates shift note (staff only)
Backend: GET /api/ops/shift-notes lists shift notes
Backend: POST /api/ops/shift-notes/{id}/acknowledge marks acknowledged
Backend: POST /api/admin/knowledge-base creates KB article (founder only)
Backend: GET /api/admin/knowledge-base lists articles (staff only)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/knowledge-base/{id} updates article (founder only)
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/knowledge-base/{id} deletes article (founder only)
Backend: GET /api/ops/search?q=test searches across queues
Backend: GET /api/ops/my-activity returns user's own audit trail
Backend: RBAC - benefactor accounts blocked from all /admin/* endpoints
Backend: RBAC - benefactor accounts blocked from all /ops/* endpoints
Frontend: Founder sidebar shows 4 tools (Announcements, System Health, Escalations, Knowledge Base)
Frontend: Sidebar collapse toggle works - icons only when collapsed
Frontend: Announcements tab renders with create form and existing announcements
Frontend: System Health tab shows DB stats, activity metrics, queue status
Frontend: Knowledge Base tab shows articles with expand/collapse and 'New Article' button
Frontend: Escalations tab shows escalations with resolve button for founder
Frontend: Tab bar includes all new tabs (Announcements, System Health, Escalations, Knowledge Base)
Frontend: Light/Dark mode toggle works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React hydration warning in AnnouncementsTab.js (line 77) - span inside option element. Low priority cosmetic fix.
seed_data_creation: Test data created during backend tests prefixed with 'TEST_' for announcements, escalations, shift notes, KB articles
context_for_next_testing_agent: New staff tools features are fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_staff_tools.py cover all CRUD operations and RBAC. Founder portal tested via Playwright automation. The Escalations tab shows open escalations with resolve buttons for founders. Knowledge Base articles expand/collapse properly. System Health shows real-time database and activity metrics.
